name: WTF?
statement:
HAI
I HAS A TUX
GIMMEH TUX
I HAS A FOO ITS 0
I HAS A BAR ITS 0
I HAS A BAZ ITS 0
I HAS A QUZ ITS 1
TUX IS NOW A NUMBR
IM IN YR LOOP NERFIN YR TUX TIL BOTH SAEM TUX AN 0
I HAS A PUR
GIMMEH PUR
PUR IS NOW A NUMBR
FOO R SUM OF FOO AN PUR
BAR R SUM OF BAR AN 1
BOTH SAEM BIGGR OF PRODUKT OF FOO AN QUZ AN PRODUKT OF BAR BAZ AN PRODUKT OF FOO AN QUZ
O RLY?
YA RLY
BAZ R FOO
QUZ R BAR
OIC
IM OUTTA YR LOOP
BAZ IS NOW A NUMBAR
VISIBLE SMOOSH QUOSHUNT OF BAZ QUZ
KTHXBYE
